response: Rewrite a business description for Google My Business profile for first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, FL. In 2002, [Name] & The [Team Name] at [Real Estate Company] was set up by [Name] and is an organization that offers Real Estate Agency expertise with sellers and buyers within commercial, private homes. The company ([Name] & The [Team Name] at [Real Estate Company]) targets homeowners and business owners as a trusted advisor for their clients in all aspects of real estate and financing and aim to maintain the relationships for a lifetime. [Name] and his team serve the following locations in Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, Lake Nona Region, Lancaster Park, what is known as central Florida, and is operated by a small team of real estate experts.
